topic: Why women crave salt before periods (electrolyte science)
caption:
Did you know that salt cravings before your period are REAL? 🤯 It's not just about the taste — it's about your body's cry for help. 🌟 Here are the top facts: 
1️⃣ Hormonal changes cause electrolyte imbalance. 
2️⃣ Salt helps your body retain water and ease cramps. 
3️⃣ The right amount of salt can reduce bloating. 
💸 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #womenshealth #periodhealth #electrolytebalance #hormones #saltcravings #menstrualhealth
